name: HDFC Millennia Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5% CashBack on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra & Swiggy
2.5% CashBack on all other online spends

welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: Attractive cashback on popular online platforms
No hassle reward redemption with direct cashback
Easy EMI conversion on purchases above ₹2,500
pros: 5% cashback on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra and Swiggy is best-in-class for a mid-tier card
2.5% on all online spends is generous for everyday use
8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
Low annual fee with easily achievable ₹1L waiver threshold
Direct cashback model avoids complex point calculations
cons: 5% cashback capped at ₹1,000 per month limits high spenders
3.5% forex markup makes it poor for international use
idealFor: Frequent online shoppers on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra and Swiggy
Young professionals looking for a low-fee cashback card
Users who prefer straightforward cashback over reward points

faqs.question: Is the 5% cashback on Amazon and Flipkart unlimited?
faqs.answer: No, the 5% cashback on Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra and Swiggy is capped at ₹1,000 per calendar month. Spends beyond this cap earn at the standard 2.5% online rate.

faqs.question: How can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: The ₹1,000 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: Does the HDFC Millennia card offer international lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the Millennia card only provides complimentary domestic airport lounge access (8 visits per year). For international lounge access, consider upgrading to a premium HDFC card.

faqs.question: Can I earn cashback on EMI transactions?
faqs.answer: No, EMI transactions, wallet loading, fuel purchases and rent payments are excluded from cashback earning.
